about.title: About
about.body: At Corinne Cohen Invest, we guide you through buying your property in Tel Aviv - from defining your needs to receiving the keys, with personal, professional support all the way.

aboutPage.title: Why choose Corinne Cohen Invest?
aboutPage.body:
At Corinne Cohen Invest, we guide you through every stage of buying your property - from defining your needs to receiving the keys. We match each client with the right property, based on budget, investment or living goals, preferred location, and personal needs.

Once the property is chosen, we accompany you through every step of the transaction alongside leading professionals - legal due diligence, financing and mortgage guidance, engineering inspections, and everything needed for a safe and sound purchase.

Behind the company stands Corinne Cohen, with over 12 years of experience in real estate in Israel and France, having guided hundreds of clients through property purchases. Her extensive relationships with leading developers and contractors give her clients access to quality opportunities and to personal, professional, and trustworthy guidance every step of the way.
